overview.sample: SXS · EDEN OF GAMING HUB Sword x Staff Overview LIVE Patch 1.0 Reset in 22:12:22 (9:00 AM AST) EDEN RANK 2 GUILD · FIRST DAWN WHAT IS IN THIS HUB MAP CARDS Tier List Best class per combat style, all regions. Guides Beginner to endgame, plus classes & systems. Builds Curated loadouts and the Build Maker. Database Skills, Fantomons and Companions. Roadmap Day-by-day progression to Season 5. Codes Redeem free launch-window rewards. RECENT UPDATES May 19, 2026 LAUNCH Global launch on iOS, Android, and PC via emulator. Boltray Games. World of Kanstein, five kingdoms, four advanced classes. May 19, 2026 COLLAB KonoSuba launch collaboration live. 650+ free pulls being distributed across launch login rewards and event milestones. Jul 29, 2026 UPCOMING Second KonoSuba arc scheduled to begin. Save Wish Stones and Fate Fruits for the rotation.

tier-list.sample: SXS · EDEN OF GAMING HUB Sword x Staff Tier List LIVE Patch 1.0 Reset in 22:12:21 (9:00 AM AST) EDEN RANK 2 GUILD · FIRST DAWN CLASS FANTOMON T1 VERDANTGLADE T2 CINDER RIDGE T3 AQUALIS T4 LOONG HAVEN T5 AETHYRIS REGION T3 Aqualis 3rd class advancement & reclass unlock INVESTMENT Grades assume a built-out account. The Sorcerer and Archmage only reach their S-tier ceiling with heavy investment, while the Warrior line (Duelist, Berserker) hits its grades far sooner. For low to medium spenders, the Warrior line returns more power per resource than the Mage line, making it the stronger value pick until your account can fund a caster's full scaling. roadmap.sample: SXS · EDEN OF GAMING HUB Sword x Staff Roadmap LIVE Patch 1.0 Reset in 22:12:14 (9:00 AM AST) EDEN RANK 2 GUILD · FIRST DAWN ENDGAME ROADMAP A day-by-day progression route from the Verdantglade launch window to the Season 5 Hapadi unlock, compiled by EOG analysts and laid out on a visual timeline by Eden of Gaming. Every region gate, dungeon power wall, job change, and reward window is plotted below. Use the filters to isolate just the dungeons you need to out-gear, or the treasure windows you can't afford to miss. Power values are placeholders pending live-server confirmation. Dates count from the global launch on May 19, 2026 in server time (Asia, GMT+7). Past days are actual; upcoming dates are estimates (marked with ~) projected from the cadence and can shift with patches, maintenance, or schedule changes. The daily reset is 8:00 PM (GMT+7), which is 6:00 AM PT / 9:00 AM ET the same calendar day for North American players, so each date below holds in both regions. 215 DAYS MAPPED 4 SEASONS 6 JOB CHANGES 350M FINAL POWER WALL Everything Regions Dungeons Job Changes Treasure Mini-games Seasonal Maps Mythic 01 LAUNCH WINDOW Verdantglade + Cinder Ridge Day 1 - 8 1 DAY Tue May 19, 2

verdict.sample: SXS · EDEN OF GAMING HUB Sword x Staff Verdict LIVE Patch 1.0 Reset in 22:12:11 (9:00 AM AST) EDEN RANK 2 GUILD · FIRST DAWN EOG.GG LAUNCH VERDICT Sword x Staff is the most patient gacha to launch this season. Boltray gates almost every meaningful system behind the second map, which means the first two weeks reward exploration and class experimentation over spending. The KonoSuba launch collab makes the entry point cheap. The skill-pull structure is the real differentiator from every other game on EOG.GG. If you want to evaluate it: pick Warrior or Mage, push map exploration, claim every free 10-roll, and do not spend Dawnium on Stellatie. The Verdantglade is a filter by design. About half the playerbase will quit before Cinder Ridge. The half that stays is the audience this game was built for. Recommended Hoard Friendly Patient Players EOG.GG Analyst Team Launch Coverage · Updated May 20, 2026 CINDER RIDGE · WHERE THE PREMIUM BANNER AND AUCTIONS UNLOCK NAMED CONDITIONS TRY IT IF You want a fantasy idle RPG that respects your time, lets you swap roles freely, and treats skill collection (rather than character collection) as the gacha hook. The KonoSuba launch collab is the largest
